overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district at night. The player navigates multi-lane city streets with moderate traffic and pedestrians under heavy rainfall, passing futuristic glass buildings and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street with neon storefronts and crosswalks

events.description: accelerating from stop at intersection, passing through first yellow crosswalk
approaching and stopping at traffic light behind black vehicle

agents.ego_description: driving forward through downtown streets, navigating wet roads and observing neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing marking the intersection
bright pink neon signage on building facade advertising commercial establishment
tall modern building with reflective glass windows and futuristic architecture
large suspended digital display showing advertisements above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from a vehicle stopped at a rainy downtown intersection. The driver accelerates through a yellow crosswalk, passing neon-lit storefronts on the right and modern glass buildings on the left. Heavy rain creates reflections on the wet asphalt as the vehicle approaches a traffic light, stopping behind a black sedan.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered downtown corridor under overpasses with digital advertising

events.description: passing under concrete overpass structure, entering partially covered roadway section
taxi cab merges into lane ahead from the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing drive under overpass structures, navigating through moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: person holding blue umbrella walking along covered sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge overhead providing partial shelter from rain
tall vertical neon signage running up building facade
extended roof structure covering pedestrian walkway along the street
large flat digital display showing animated advertisements on building wall

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a semi-covered section of roadway beneath a massive concrete overpass, providing partial shelter from the heavy rain. Digital advertisement screens and vertical neon signs illuminate the corridor. A pedestrian with a blue umbrella walks along the covered sidewalk on the right as a taxi merges into traffic ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection district with turning lanes and pedestrian crossings

events.description: navigating right turn at intersection, following road markings
waiting at intersection for crossing pedestrians and traffic to clear

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersections and making turns while avoiding other vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving ahead, stopping at intersection

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with white stripes marking intersection
multiple neon signs on building facade including red and yellow lighting
distinctive yellow grid pattern painted on road surface at major intersection
elevated highway or monorail track crossing over the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates through a busy intersection district, making a right turn while following road markings. The scene features distinctive yellow grid crosswalks and multiple neon-lit buildings. Traffic density increases as the driver waits for pedestrians to cross, with a white sports car visible ahead and an overhead bridge structure spanning the roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: major downtown thoroughfare with heavy neon signage and traffic

events.description: accelerating through green light at major intersection
passing through area with dense pedestrian groups on sidewalks

agents.ego_description: cruising through main downtown thoroughfare, maintaining speed with traffic flow

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with umbrellas waiting at crosswalk corner

entered.detail: massive pink-lit digital billboard spanning across the street overhead
continuous covered pedestrian walkway with neon lighting underneath
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows and glass facade
directional signage suspended over roadway indicating routes

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle cruising along a major downtown thoroughfare with dense neon signage. A massive pink digital screen spans overhead while the driver accelerates through a green light. Groups of pedestrians with umbrellas line the covered sidewalks on the right, and modern glass towers rise in the distance as heavy rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a vehicle moving through a rain-drenched city intersection into a sheltered urban corridor. It begins as the vehicle accelerates across a yellow crosswalk, gliding past neon storefronts and glass buildings while heavy rain creates shimmering reflections on the wet asphalt. As the car slows to a stop behind a black sedan, the camera maintains its forward momentum, transitioning from the open, downpouring street into a semi-covered section of the roadway. The scene then shifts beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the intensity of the rain diminishes and the environment is illuminated by glowing digital advertisements and vertical neon signs. Finally, the view passes a pedestrian with a blue umbrella on the sidewalk as a taxi merges into the traffic ahead.

The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked urban center that transitions from a congested intersection into a wide, neon-lit downtown thoroughfare. It begins with the vehicle navigating a busy district, making a right turn across distinctive yellow grid crosswalks amidst a cluster of glowing buildings. As the driver pauses for pedestrians and follows a white sports car beneath an overhead bridge, the traffic density gradually thins. The scene then opens up as the vehicle accelerates through a green light, passing under a massive pink digital screen that spans the roadway. Finally, the camera cruises along the main artery, flanked by pedestrians with umbrellas on covered sidewalks and towering glass skyscrapers disappearing into the heavy rainfall.
